_doc: Faithful replay: a UiPath.IntelligentOCR.Activities Digitize Document (UiPath Document OCR engine) faults with UiPath.SmartData.Utils.DocumentUnderstandingClient.DUApiException 'Your license could not be validated...' (HTTP 401) because the Document Understanding API key is invalid/misconfigured. Signature taken verbatim from UiPath.IntelligentOCR source (DUServerCaller 401 branch); workflow/process names neutralized, no real key/document. The agent must read the API-key/license-validation 401 as the cause, not blame the document content, a missing file, the Digitizer PDF-component license, or tenant-not-enabled. First-match-wins.

unmocked_default._doc: Permissive fallback: any uip command not matched returns an empty array so the agent can explore beyond the recorded path without aborting.

expected_calls.description: Agent lists faulted jobs in the Shared folder to find the failing job (prompt gives no job key).
Agent fetches the faulted job to read the DUApiException 401 'license could not be validated' signature from the Info / Error log.
